zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibilla de Cantilupe於大約1222年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登時，她的父親William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo39歲，母親Millicent Gournay34歲。她於1245年與Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1278年在英國貝德福爾貝德福德享年57歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibilla de Cantilupe于大约1222年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登时，她的父亲William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo39岁，母亲Millicent Gournay34岁。她于1245年与Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1278年在英国貝德福爾貝德福德享年57岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibilla de Cantilupe was born about 1222, in Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, was 39 and her mother, Millicent Gournay, was 34. She married Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter in 1245, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1278, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibilla de Cantilupe est née environ 1222, à Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Millicent Gournay, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter en 1245, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1278, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibilla de Cantilupe um 1222 in Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo 39 und ihre Mutter Millicent Gournay 34. Sie hat 1245 in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1278 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla de Cantilupe è nata il circa 1222 nel Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Millicent Gournay, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter nel 1245, nel Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1278, nel Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibilla de Cantilupeが約1222年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンブレデンで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloは39歳，母Millicent Gournayは34歳であった。1245年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードでRoger Hemdesworth Le Charetterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1278年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードで57歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla de Cantilupe(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 벅잉함실르 햄블레든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent Gournay(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla de Cantilupe nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Millicent Gournay, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter em 1245, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1278, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibilla de Cantilupe родилась около 1222 г. в местности хамбледен, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent Gournay, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter в 1245 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1278 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibilla de Cantilupe nació aproximadamente 1222, en Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Millicent Gournay, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Roger Hemdesworth Le Charetter en 1245, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1278, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
